outcome: Found napi-build as unused dependency in tokmd-node

command: rm crates/tokmd-node/build.rs && sed -i '/napi-build = "2"/d' crates/tokmd-node/Cargo.toml && sed -i '/\[build-dependencies\]/d' crates/tokmd-node/Cargo.toml
cargo build -p tokmd-node && cd crates/tokmd-node && npm ci && npm run build:debug && npm run test
outcome: Successfully built and ran node tests without napi-build
